name: drax-cc
description: drax-cc — lean, on-demand agentic orchestration for solo founders. The CEO opens every run via /drax-init and builds only as far as the most important objective needs. Artifacts follow a strict sectorial layout (drax-workspace/<sector>/<brand>-site/). Slice 1: branding loop (CMO/IC/CTO). Slice 2 (/drax-site): the CMO-led, IC-gated Site Build Package — with the CLO entering early for mandatory legal pages (ToS/Privacy/Cookie). Slice 3 (/drax-build): the CTO gates the package for coverage (incl. legal), then builds the real site in drax-site/. Slice 4 (/drax-secure): the CISO secures the deployment — VPS hardening, authorized pentest, SOC. Every IC is activated only on demand; every live infra action is approval-gated.
